title: tetraria pillansii
intro: Tetraria pillansii, also known as Cape quillwort, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). Traditionally, Tetraria pillansii has been used in South African folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits associated with Tetraria pillansii include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as digestive problems and skin conditions. Tetraria pillansii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
